scripts.dev:clean: for p in 3000 3001 3002 3003 4000 4002; do ids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$ids" ]; then kill -9 $ids; fi; done && pkill -f 'next dev' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && pkill -f 'nest start --watch' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && rm -f apps/lireons-frontend/.next/dev/lock
scripts.dev:all: pnpm run dev:clean && turbo run start:dev --parallel
scripts.dev:safe: pnpm run dev:clean && pnpm --filter lireons-frontend run start:dev & pnpm --filter lireons-main run start:dev & pnpm --filter @lireons/academy-api run start:dev & wait
scripts.dev:workers: pnpm --filter @lireons/media-worker run start:dev & pnpm --filter @lireons/code-runner-worker run start:dev & wait
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e apps/lireons-main/.env -- pnpm --filter @lireons/database exec prisma migrate dev
